pr.title: Record: Loqui Auris — 10L + SWA + Standard TTT (val_bpb=1.1100)

output.summary: 10-layer GQA transformer with ReLU², SmearGate+BigramHash skips, SWA, and standard AdamW TTT on the quantized weights for final tuning.
output.valOnlyReasoning: Standard AdamW TTT fine-tunes the quantized weights on validation data after training.
techniques: 10-layer GQA w/ ReLU², SmearGate, BigramHash, U-Net skips
SWA averaging with Muon+AdamW optimizer mix
Post-training AdamW TTT on quantized weights
